examples: Some laws also stipulate in explicit terms that Chinese citizens have obligations to take care of parents and raise children.
Companies should stipulate that they will never ask for passwords, be consistent, document decisions, consider the source used and be aware that other laws may apply.
PayPal policies stipulate that sellers must prove buyers received an item.
The current rules stipulate one member of staff for every eight children over three years old.
Even if you terminate early, most wedding contracts stipulate that a deposit will not be refunded.
